---
title: "Reference"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Curated Documentation Hub

Use this page to route into workflows and concepts. Function-level details remain in pkgdown.

[API reference](pkgdown/reference/index.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Articles index](pkgdown/articles/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Start and workflow routing

- [Start hub](start/index.qmd)
- [Start roadmap](start/roadmap.qmd)
- [Start here](start/start-here.qmd)
- [Basic compile and run](start/basic-model-compile-run.qmd)
- [Backends and workflow](start/backends-and-workflow.qmd)
- [Troubleshooting](start/troubleshooting.qmd)

## Topic hubs

- [Kernels hub](kernels.qmd)
- [Advanced hub](advanced/index.qmd)
- [Examples hub](examples/index.qmd)

## pkgdown authoritative docs

- [Function reference](pkgdown/reference/index.html)
- [Articles index](pkgdown/articles/index.html)

### Core vignette articles (authoritative in pkgdown)

- [basic-01](pkgdown/articles/basic-01.html)
- [model-spec-02](pkgdown/articles/model-spec-02.html)
- [unconditional-03](pkgdown/articles/unconditional-03.html)
- [conditional-04](pkgdown/articles/conditional-04.html)
- [causal-05](pkgdown/articles/causal-05.html)

:::
:::
